headline: Hims Insider Makes First Stock Purchase Since 2021 Amid Weight-Loss Drug Pivot
summary: Hims & Hers Health shares have slumped in 2026 as the telehealth provider moves away from selling compounded GLP-1 medications.

headline: Tribeca premieres AI movie: 'Dream of Violets' executive producer & director on making of an AI film
summary: Tom Rogers, ‘Dreams of Violets’ executive producer and Fountain 0 executive chairman, and Ash Koosha, ‘Dreams of Violets’ director and Fountain 0 CEO, join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the making of a movie produced entirely with generative AI tools, AI impact on movie industry jobs, and more.

headline: Gecko Robotics CEO: AI should predict failures before tragedy

headline: HIMS Stock Heads For Weekly Loss — But Ex-Netflix CFO Is Buying The Dip Despite BofA’s GLP-1 Warning
summary: BofA cut its HIMS price target to $25 from $28, while warning that the company’s 2026 outlook depends on a “significant” ramp-up in GLP-1 growth.
